LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth_Hediff.label: Shutdown
LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth_Hediff.description: All systems of this mechanical Wula have been shut down.
LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth_Hediff.descriptionSh: All systems of this mechanical Wula have been shut down—if awakening is needed, assistance from another colonist is required.
